node.statement: MAT-CHAN-001: For a finite complex matrix isometry E with `E^*E=I`, the ascending observable map `O → E^*OE` is unital and star-preserving, and the logical lift `O → E O E^*` retracts under ascending: `E^*(E O E^*) E = O`. This formalises finite-matrix parts of `summary.tex` §11.3 (ascending channel) — the CAD-`THM-8.2.1` correspondence is to the unital ucp/tpcp ascending-channel claim, and `handoff §8.3` corresponds to the logical-lift retraction equation in `summary.tex` §11.3.
